name: TIL Limited
summary: TIL Limited manufactures and markets a range of material handling, lifting, port, and road construction equipment in India and internationally. Its products include rough terrain cranes, truck and truck mounted cranes, pick and carry cranes, Manitowoc crawler cranes and grove cranes, reach stackers, forklift trucks, container handlers, crushing and screening stationary plant solutions, crushing and screening wheel mounted solutions, and crushing and screening track mounted solutions, as well as unit equipment, such as feeders, crushers, and high frequency screens. The company also deals in spares; and provides services to related equipment. TIL Limited was founded in 1944 and is headquartered in Kolkata, India.
